rows.finalText: Across "What is the next right step in my calling", Purpose / Calling with a right path emphasis gives the clearest frame. Heart (24) in Past sets the tone with the need to choose what aligns with your core values. Here, Heart emphasizes what still feels genuinely meaningful, and the part of the path that remains emotionally true. Stork (17) in Present acts as the fulcrum, putting change is active and potentially beneficial where the sequence can turn. Stork colors your calling through improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form. The likely direction shows in Future through Mountain (21), and it suggests progress may be slower but still viable once the pivot is met directly. Here, Mountain emphasizes the obstacle, delay, and effort layer of the situation, especially where progress may be slower but still viable. The path becomes clearest where Heart (24) meets Stork (17): a blend of love and change, asking you to speak and act from authentic care while staying alert to constant switching without consolidation. Stork (17) is the real hinge in this spread. Stork colors your calling through improvement, transition, upgrades, and the feeling that something is trying to move into a better form. Heart (24) with Stork (17) keep emphasizing a blend of love and change, asking you to speak and act from authentic care while staying alert to constant switching without consolidation. Sequence improvements deliberately so Mountain (21) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
